heroHeadline: Day 42: VP Vance Lands in Islamabad for First Direct US-Iran Talks as Israel Escalates Lebanon Strikes
heroSubtitle: VP Vance arrives in Islamabad for the first direct US-Iran talks since the war began, warning Tehran not to 'play' the US. Pakistan sets a modest goal: keep dialogue open, not a final deal. Meanwhile, Israel threatens Lebanon's healthcare infrastructure, straining the fragile ceasefire.
footerNote: Data updated 2026-04-10. Sources include CENTCOM, IDF, IRNA, IAEA, Hengaw, HRANA, Al Jazeera, Anadolu Agency, Reuters, Associated Press, CNN, CNBC, Bloomberg, IEA, DW, The Intercept, Pakistani Foreign Ministry, Washington Post, Financial Times, AgoraVox, The Guardian, BBC, New York Times, Fox News, Military.com, Wall Street Journal, The Independent.
